---
title: "Exercise 11: Nonlinear Programming (Lagrange + KKT + SVM)"
subtitle: "[Optimization in Machine Learning](https://slds-lmu.github.io/website_optimization/)"
notebook-view: false
---

::: {.content-hidden when-format="pdf"}
::: {.hidden}
{{< include ../_quarto/latex-math.qmd >}}
:::
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Reproducibility

Produced with Python 3.10 and R 4.4.1. To reproduce, install the pinned package versions below.

::: {.panel-tabset}
### Python
```bash
pip install numpy==2.0.2 matplotlib==3.10.8 cvxpy==1.7.5
```
### R
```r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_version("CVXR", "1.8.2")
remotes::install_version("ggplot2", "3.5.1")
remotes::install_version("mlr3", "1.6.0")
```
:::
:::

INSERT_problem_1

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

INSERT_solution_1_text
:::

INSERT_problem_2_intro

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R
{{< embed sol_nlp_R.ipynb#setup_data echo=true >}}
### Python
{{< embed sol_nlp_py.ipynb#setup_data echo=true >}}
:::

INSERT_problem_2a

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

INSERT_solution_2a_text
:::

INSERT_problem_2b

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R
{{< embed sol_nlp_R.ipynb#solution_2b_code echo=true >}}
### Python
{{< embed sol_nlp_py.ipynb#solution_2b_code echo=true >}}
:::
:::

INSERT_problem_2c

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

INSERT_solution_2c_text
:::

INSERT_problem_2d

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

INSERT_solution_2d_text
:::

INSERT_problem_2e

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
**Solution.**

::: {.panel-tabset}
### R
{{< embed sol_nlp_R.ipynb#solution_2e_code echo=true >}}
### Python
{{< embed sol_nlp_py.ipynb#solution_2e_code echo=true >}}
:::
:::
